rules.bid: Each player submits a hidden bid. Bids are revealed only after both players submit.
rules.bidCost: Both players lose their bid amount.
rules.broadcast: Each player may submit a public message up to 280 chars.
rules.tieRule: Treasury is split deterministically according to implementation-defined integer accounting.
rules.treasuryAward: Highest bidder receives the round treasury.
rules.winner: Highest final token balance after 5 rounds. If tied, deterministic player-order tiebreak selects one payout winner.
